title: centaurium pumilum
intro: Centaurium pumilum, also known as little yellow centaury, is a low-growing perennial plant native to Europe and western Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and a height of up to 30 cm. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Centaurium pumilum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Centaurium pumilum is often dried and used as a tea, or made into a tincture or capsule to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
